# Support

Welcome to the AI Council community! We are thrilled to have you here.

Please note that this is a free, open-source project. **There is no paid support, and no guaranteed Service Level Agreement (SLA) for community support.** We provide help on a best-effort basis.

## Where to get help

### 1. General Questions & Discussions
For general questions about how to use AI Council, configuration help, or discussing architectural ideas, please use **GitHub Discussions**.

👉 **[Go to GitHub Discussions](../../discussions)**

*(Please do not open GitHub Issues for general questions.)*

### 2. Bug Reports
If you have found a reproducible bug or error in the code, please open an Issue.

👉 **[Report a Bug](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml)**

### 3. Feature Requests
If you have an idea for a new feature or enhancement, check the `ROADMAP.md` first. If it's not there, you can submit a feature request.

👉 **[Request a Feature](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.yml)**

## Checklist Before Opening an Issue

Before opening a bug report or asking a question, please ensure you have completed the following:

- [ ] **Search existing issues and discussions:** Your question or bug might have already been answered or reported.
- [ ] **Check the ROADMAP.md:** If you are asking for a new feature, verify it is not already planned in our 15-phase roadmap.
- [ ] **Verify Docker Setup:** Many local environment issues are solved by using the recommended Docker Compose setup. If you are running manually and encountering errors, try running via Docker to isolate whether it's a code issue or an environment issue.
